parsed.generic_mechanism: The largest gap comes from dependency ordering: one version prepares claims, examples, and instructions cumulatively, while the other scrambles those units so local clarity cannot produce chapter-level momentum.

paraphrased_evidence.A: Locally intelligible sentences arrive in reverse dependency order: answers precede questions, headings trail their sections, references lack timely setup, and the text finishes by restarting the chapter.
paraphrased_evidence.B: The chapter moves from personal symptoms and public stakes through a small everyday example, an explanatory model, a conversion story, and reading instructions; emphatic promises and recurring comparisons sometimes overextend the argument.
